evals.prompt: Create a new skill called 'competitive-intel' that helps product managers run systematic competitive intelligence research, track competitor moves, and structure findings into actionable reports.
evals.expected_output: A complete skill creation workflow producing a valid SKILL.md with proper frontmatter, README.md, and optionally evals
expectations: Output creates skills/competitive-intel/SKILL.md with valid frontmatter (name, description, license only)
Output writes a description starting with 'This skill should be used when the user...'
Output creates skills/competitive-intel/README.md with metadata table
Output includes required sections: When to Use, Workflow, Critical Rules, Example Usage
Output validates the skill before completing

evals.prompt: Improve the existing 'brainstorming' skill. Run evals, identify where it underperforms, and optimize the description and workflow to improve trigger accuracy and output quality.
evals.expected_output: An improvement cycle for the brainstorming skill with eval results, identified weaknesses, and optimized skill content
expectations: Output reads the existing brainstorming SKILL.md
Output runs or simulates evals to identify weaknesses
Output identifies specific improvement areas in the description or workflow
Output produces an improved version of the skill
Output compares before/after and explains what was changed and why
